# Faber

Faber is a package-oriented programming language with a Latin behavioural
vocabulary, a small regular grammar, and a type-first static type system.
Source compiles through the Radix compiler to reviewable Rust and native
binaries. Meaning lives in a semantic core (HIR); every human-language
keyword surface and every codegen target is a rendering of that core.

This document is the machine-readable public entrypoint for agents.
It is generated during the site build from examples/corpus frontmatter.

## Start here

1. Host: https://faberlang.dev ‚Äî `/` is the language portal (locale chooser).
2. Full authored HTML docs: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/ (prefer this unless the user asked for another locale).
3. Read this file before editing Faber source or scaffolding packages.
4. Use corpus term links below for exact keyword, syntax, alias, and relation data.
5. Read https://faberlang.dev/agents/index.md for the agent learning path.
6. Read https://faberlang.dev/llms-full.txt when you need the expanded map.
7. Choose focused skills from https://faberlang.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json.
8. Other site locales (`/th-TH/`, `/zh-Hans/`, `/ar/`, ‚Ä¶) ship full translated prose docs + localized chrome; code via each pack's reader locale.

## Install

Current release: Faber 1.1.1

- Release: https://github.com/faberlang/releases/releases/tag/faber-v1.1.1
- macOS arm64: https://github.com/faberlang/releases/releases/download/faber-v1.1.1/faber-v1.1.1-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
- Linux x64: https://github.com/faberlang/releases/releases/download/faber-v1.1.1/faber-v1.1.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
- Human install page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/start/install.html

Minimal verify after install:

```bash
faber --version
faber explain SEM001
```

## Language shape

- Type-first bindings: `textus nomen` not `nomen: textus`.
- Latin behavioural words: `functio`, `genus`, `fixum`, `redde`, `si`, `itera`.
- Glyphs: `‚Üê` bind, `‚Üí` return type, `‚à¥` compact branch, `‚â°` equality, `‚à™` union.
- Nullable: `T ‚à™ nihil`.
- Comments: `#` only, on its own line. No `//`, no trailing `#`.
- Packages: directory with `faber.toml` + `src/*.fab`.

## Generated corpus frontmatter reference

- Distinct frontmatter terms: 189
- Canonical term pages: 171
- Alias spellings: 98
- Categories: 46
- Source: examples/corpus/**/*.fab TOML frontmatter

Each canonical record has: term, kind, category, summary, syntax signature, aliases, relations, and page URL.

### Kinds

- annotation: 8
- concept: 13
- conversio: 4
- existing-home: 5
- keyword: 110
- literal: 1
- method: 2
- modifier: 1
- operator: 2
- operator-group: 20
- pointer: 1
- type: 4

### Canonical terms

#### `!.`

- Canonical: `!.`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: non-null-chain
- Summary: Asserted member, index, and call access on known-present values.
- Syntax: `<expression>!.<name> | <expression>![<expression>] | <expression>!(<args>)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `!.`, `![`, `!(`, `nonnulla`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%21..html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/nonnull-chain.fab

#### `?.`

- Canonical: `?.`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: optional-chain
- Summary: Null-safe member, index, and call access.
- Syntax: `<expression>?.<name> | <expression>?[<expression>] | <expression>?(<args>)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `?.`, `?[`, `?(`, `vel`, `sponte`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%3F..html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/optional-chain.fab

#### `@`

- Canonical: `@`
- Kind: annotation
- Category: metadata
- Summary: Introduces an annotation for the following declaration or statement.
- Syntax: `@ <name>`
- Aliases: `annotation`
- Related: `nondum`, `cli`, `futura`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%40.html
- Source: examples/corpus/directiva/directiva.fab

#### `ab`

- Canonical: `ab`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: iteration
- Summary: Selects numeric range iteration in an itera loop.
- Syntax: `itera ab <range> <binding>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `itera`, `ex`, `de`, `per`, `ab pipeline`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ab.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ab/ab.fab

#### `abstractus`

- Canonical: `abstractus`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Marks a type or member as abstract.
- Syntax: `abstractus genus <name> <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `genus`, `implendum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/abstractus.html
- Source: examples/corpus/abstractus/abstractus.fab

#### `ad`

- Canonical: `ad`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: endpoint
- Summary: ad opens a sermo endpoint and materializes the stream with an explicit conversio target.
- Syntax: `ad 'runtime:echo' (payload) ‚Ü¶ textus`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `conversio`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ad.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ad/sermo-conversio.fab

#### `adfirma`

- Canonical: `adfirma`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: testing
- Summary: Asserts that a condition is true at runtime.
- Syntax: `adfirma <expression> [, <message>]`
- Aliases: `assert`
- Related: `proba`, `fac`, `cape`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/adfirma.html
- Source: examples/corpus/adfirma/adfirma.fab

#### `ante`

- Canonical: `ante`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: range
- Summary: Creates an exclusive range with a Latin keyword.
- Syntax: `<expression> ante <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `usque`, `‚Ä•`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ante.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ante/ante.fab

#### `applications`

- Canonical: `applications`
- Kind: pointer
- Category: application
- Summary: Points to the coreutils application exempla workspace.
- Syntax: `n/a`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `cli`, `argumenta`, `operandus`, `exitus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/applications.html
- Source: examples/corpus/applications/coreutils.fab

#### `argumenta`

- Canonical: `argumenta`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: entry
- Summary: Binds command-line arguments for an entry point.
- Syntax: `incipit argumenta <name> <block> | functio <name>() argumenta <name> <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `incipit`, `cli`, `imperium`, `optio`, `operandus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/argumenta.html
- Source: examples/corpus/argumenta/argumenta.fab

#### `ascii`

- Canonical: `ascii`
- Kind: existing-home
- Category: literal
- Summary: Single-quoted ASCII machine-text literals.
- Syntax: `'<text>'`
- Aliases: `'...'`
- Related: `textus`, `string`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ascii.html
- Source: examples/corpus/literalia/ascii.fab

#### `async solum leget`

- Canonical: `async solum leget`
- Kind: concept
- Category: ad
- Summary: @ futura solum.leget<T> uses the same solum:lege route as sync solum.lege<T>.
- Syntax: `solum.leget<textus>(via)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `ad`, `solum`, `futura`, `sermo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/async%20solum%20leget.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ad/async-solum-leget.fab

#### `async tempus dormiet`

- Canonical: `async tempus dormiet`
- Kind: concept
- Category: ad
- Summary: @ futura tempus.dormiet and sync tempus.expectet share the tempus:dormiet route.
- Syntax: `tempus.expectet(ms) | cede tempus.dormiet(ms)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `ad`, `tempus`, `futura`, `sermo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/async%20tempus%20dormiet.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ad/async-tempus-dormiet.fab

#### `aut`

- Canonical: `aut`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: logic
- Summary: Combines boolean expressions with logical or.
- Syntax: `<expression> aut <expression>`
- Aliases: `or`
- Related: `et`, `vel`, `‚äª`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/aut.html
- Source: examples/corpus/binarius/binarius.fab

#### `bivalens`

- Canonical: `bivalens`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Primitive types bivalens, vacuum, and ignotum.
- Syntax: `bivalens | vacuum | ignotum`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `verum`, `falsum`, `functio`, `‚à∑`, `vacuum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/bivalens.html
- Source: examples/corpus/intrinseca/primitiva.fab

#### `block-string`

- Canonical: `block-string`
- Kind: existing-home
- Category: literal
- Summary: Block textus literals with embedded quotes and newlines.
- Syntax: `¬´<text>¬ª`
- Aliases: `¬´...¬ª`
- Related: `string`, `textus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/block-string.html
- Source: examples/corpus/literalia/block-string.fab

#### `cape`

- Canonical: `cape`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: errors
- Summary: Starts a catch block.
- Syntax: `<structured-statement> cape <name> <block>`
- Aliases: `catch`
- Related: `fac`, `iace`, `‚á•`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/cape.html
- Source: examples/corpus/cape/cape.fab

#### `casu`

- Canonical: `casu`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Introduces a branch inside an elige or discerne statement.
- Syntax: `casu <expression> <block>`
- Aliases: `case`
- Related: `elige`, `discerne`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/casu.html
- Source: examples/corpus/casu/casu.fab

#### `cede`

- Canonical: `cede`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: async
- Summary: Awaits a promise or yields a value depending on context.
- Syntax: `cede <expression>`
- Aliases: `await`, `yield`
- Related: `futura`, `cursor`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/cede.html
- Source: examples/corpus/cede/cede.fab

#### `ceteri`

- Canonical: `ceteri`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Collects remaining parameters, operands, or extracted fields.
- Syntax: `ceteri <type> <name>`
- Aliases: `rest`
- Related: `functio`, `operandus`, `ex`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ceteri.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ceteri/ceteri.fab

#### `ceterum`

- Canonical: `ceterum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts the default branch of an elige or discerne statement.
- Syntax: `ceterum <block>`
- Aliases: `default`
- Related: `elige`, `discerne`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ceterum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ceterum/ceterum.fab

#### `clausa`

- Canonical: `clausa`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Closure and lambda expressions with inferred or annotated types.
- Syntax: `<params> ‚à¥ <expression> | (<params>) ‚Üí <type> ‚à¥ <expression>`
- Aliases: `lambda`, `closure`
- Related: `‚à¥`, `functio`, `numerus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/clausa.html
- Source: examples/corpus/clausa/clausa.fab

#### `clausura`

- Canonical: `clausura`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Declares or explains an inline closure expression; compact ‚à¥ syntax is preferred for new code.
- Syntax: `<type> <name> [‚Üí <type>] [‚á• <error-type>] ‚à¥ <expression|fac-block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚à¥`, `functio`, `fac`, `cape`, `cede`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/clausura.html
- Source: examples/corpus/clausura/clausura.fab

#### `cli`

- Canonical: `cli`
- Kind: annotation
- Category: cli
- Summary: Braced canonical @ cli program marker.
- Syntax: `@ cli { nomen = "NAME" }`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `cli`, `optio`, `annotation-sugar`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/cli.html
- Source: examples/corpus/annotation-sugar/cli-braced.fab

#### `conversio-fallibilis`

- Canonical: `conversio-fallibilis`
- Kind: conversio
- Category: conversion
- Summary: Three recovery postures for fallible conversio: inline ‚á•, ‚á• propagation, and fac/cape.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚Ü¶ <type> | functio ‚Ä¶ ‚Üí T ‚á• E | fac { ‚Ä¶ } cape err { ‚Ä¶ }`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚Ü¶`, `‚á•`, `fac`, `cape`, `iace`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/conversio-fallibilis.html
- Source: examples/corpus/conversio/fallibilis.fab

#### `copia`

- Canonical: `copia`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: collection
- Summary: Generic set collection type.
- Syntax: `copia<T>`
- Aliases: `set`
- Related: `lista`, `tabula`, `inter`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/copia.html
- Source: examples/corpus/intrinseca/copia-fundamenta.fab

#### `cura`

- Canonical: `cura`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: resource
- Summary: Starts an allocator scope.
- Syntax: `cura "<allocator-kind>" fixum _ <alloc> <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `arena`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/cura.html
- Source: examples/corpus/cura/cura.fab

#### `curata`

- Canonical: `curata`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Marks a function as requiring an allocator binding.
- Syntax: `functio <name>(...) curata <required> [ut <local>] ‚Üí <type>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `cura`, `arena`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/curata.html
- Source: examples/corpus/curata/curata.fab

#### `cursor`

- Canonical: `cursor`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: async
- Summary: Marks a function as a generator.
- Syntax: `@ cursor`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `futura`, `cede`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/cursor.html
- Source: examples/corpus/cursor/cursor.fab

#### `custodi`

- Canonical: `custodi`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Groups early-exit guard checks before the main body of a function.
- Syntax: `custodi <block>`
- Aliases: `guard`
- Related: `si`, `ergo`, `redde`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/custodi.html
- Source: examples/corpus/custodi/custodi.fab

#### `de`

- Canonical: `de`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: iteration
- Summary: Introduces borrowed iteration or borrowed parameters.
- Syntax: `de <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `ex`, `in`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/de.html
- Source: examples/corpus/de/de.fab

#### `descriptio`

- Canonical: `descriptio`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: cli
- Summary: Attaches a description string to CLI metadata.
- Syntax: `@ descriptio <string>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `versio`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/descriptio.html
- Source: examples/corpus/descriptio/descriptio.fab

#### `discerne`

- Canonical: `discerne`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts an exhaustive pattern match over a value or values.
- Syntax: `discerne <subject> <block>`
- Aliases: `match`
- Related: `discretio`, `casu`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/discerne.html
- Source: examples/corpus/discerne/discerne.fab

#### `discretio`

- Canonical: `discretio`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Declares a tagged union with variant payloads.
- Syntax: `discretio <name> [<type-params>] <block>`
- Aliases: `union`, `sum type`
- Related: `ordo`, `discerne`, `finge`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/discretio.html
- Source: examples/corpus/discretio/discretio.fab

#### `dum`

- Canonical: `dum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Repeats a block while a condition remains true.
- Syntax: `dum <condition> <block|ergo statement>`
- Aliases: `while`
- Related: `si`, `ergo`, `fac`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/dum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/dum/dum.fab

#### `ego`

- Canonical: `ego`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: object
- Summary: Refers to the current instance inside a method.
- Syntax: `ego.<member>`
- Aliases: `self`, `this`
- Related: `generis`, `nexum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ego.html
- Source: examples/corpus/ego/ego.fab

#### `elige`

- Canonical: `elige`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts a value-based branch statement.
- Syntax: `elige <expression> <block>`
- Aliases: `switch`, `choose`
- Related: `casu`, `ceterum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/elige.html
- Source: examples/corpus/elige/elige.fab

#### `emitte`

- Canonical: `emitte`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: endpoint
- Summary: Retired statement-level frame emit; use expression ad with sermo directional views.
- Syntax: `emitte <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `ad`, `meus`, `tuus`, `sermo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/emitte.html
- Source: examples/corpus/emitte/emitte.fab

#### `ergo`

- Canonical: `ergo`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Compact consequent after si/dum heads via ergo, with ‚à¥ reserved for closure bodies.
- Syntax: `<head> ergo <statement>`
- Aliases: `ergo`, `therefore`
- Related: `si`, `redde`, `clausura`, `ergo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ergo.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/control.fab

#### `errata`

- Canonical: `errata`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Marks a function parameter or binding as carrying an error value.
- Syntax: `functio <name>(...) errata <ident> ‚Üí <type>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚á•`, `cape`, `iace`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/errata.html
- Source: examples/corpus/errata/errata.fab

#### `est`

- Canonical: `est`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: logic
- Summary: Tests whether a value is or matches a type-like target.
- Syntax: `<expression> est <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `non est`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/est.html
- Source: examples/corpus/est/est.fab

#### `et`

- Canonical: `et`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: logic
- Summary: Combines boolean expressions with logical and.
- Syntax: `<expression> et <expression>`
- Aliases: `and`
- Related: `aut`, `non`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/et.html
- Source: examples/corpus/et/et.fab

#### `ex`

- Canonical: `ex`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: destructuring
- Summary: Extracts fields from a value into local bindings.
- Syntax: `ex <expression> <fixum|varia> <field> [, ...] [ceteri <ident>]`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `de`, `ut`, `ceteri`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ex.html
- Source: examples/corpus/destructura/lista.fab

#### `exitus`

- Canonical: `exitus`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: entry
- Summary: Sets the exit code or exit expression for an entry point.
- Syntax: `incipit argumenta <name> exitus <expr> <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `incipit`, `incipiet`, `argumenta`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/exitus.html
- Source: examples/corpus/exitus/exitus.fab

#### `fac`

- Canonical: `fac`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts a scoped do-while style loop.
- Syntax: `fac <block> [cape <name> <block>] [dum <condition>]`
- Aliases: `do`
- Related: `dum`, `cape`, `clausura`, `perge`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/fac.html
- Source: examples/corpus/fac/fac-cape.fab

#### `falsum`

- Canonical: `falsum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: boolean
- Summary: Represents the false boolean value and can prefix a falsity check.
- Syntax: `falsum [<expression>]`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `verum`, `nihil`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/falsum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/falsum/falsum.fab

#### `finge`

- Canonical: `finge`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: object
- Summary: Constructs a tagged union variant.
- Syntax: `finge <variant> [{ <field> = <expr>, ... }] [‚à∑ <type>]`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `discretio`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/finge.html
- Source: examples/corpus/finge/finge.fab

#### `fixum`

- Canonical: `fixum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: binding
- Summary: Declares an immutable binding.
- Syntax: `fixum <type|_> <pattern> [‚Üê <expression>]`
- Aliases: `const`, `immutable`
- Related: `varia`, `sit`, `‚Üê`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/fixum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/fixum/fixum.fab

#### `forma`

- Canonical: `forma`
- Kind: literal
- Category: template
- Summary: Captured backtick templates for bound payloads.
- Syntax: ``template`(args)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `scriptum`, `textus`, `valor`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/forma.html
- Source: examples/corpus/literalia/forma.fab

#### `fractus`

- Canonical: `fractus`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Primitive floating-point number type.
- Syntax: `fractus`
- Aliases: `float`
- Related: `numerus`, `‚Ü¶`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/fractus.html
- Source: examples/corpus/intrinseca/fractus-comparatio.fab

#### `fragilis`

- Canonical: `fragilis`

- Category: testing
- Summary: Marks a test as fragile.
- Syntax: `fragilis <number>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `requirit`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/fragilis.html
- Source: examples/corpus/fragilis/fragilis.fab

#### `functio`

- Canonical: `functio`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: function
- Summary: Declares a named function or method.
- Syntax: `functio <name>(<params>) [modifiers] [‚Üí <type>] [‚á• <error-type>] <block>`
- Aliases: `function`
- Related: `‚Üí`, `‚á•`, `redde`, `sponte`, `ceteri`, `prae`, `curata`, `futura`, `cursor`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/functio.html
- Source: examples/corpus/functio/functio.fab

#### `futura`

- Canonical: `futura`
- Kind: annotation
- Category: async
- Summary: Braced canonical @ futura unit marker.
- Syntax: `@ futura { }`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `futura`, `annotation-sugar`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/futura.html
- Source: examples/corpus/annotation-sugar/futura-braced.fab

#### `futurum`

- Canonical: `futurum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: testing
- Summary: Marks a test case as pending future work with a reason.
- Syntax: `proba <name> futurum <reason> <block>`
- Aliases: `todo`, `pending`
- Related: `proba`, `omitte`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/futurum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/futurum/futurum.fab

#### `generic`

- Canonical: `generic`
- Kind: concept
- Category: type
- Summary: Generic functions with angle-bracket type and magnitudo parameters.
- Syntax: `functio <name><T, magnitudo N>(<params>) ‚Üí <type> <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `functio`, `genus`, `magnitudo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/generic.html
- Source: examples/corpus/generic/generic.fab

#### `generic-call-type-args`

- Canonical: `generic-call-type-args`
- Kind: concept
- Category: function
- Summary: Explicit type arguments at function and namespaced call sites.
- Syntax: `callee<type, ...>(args) ‚Äî id<textus>(...), module.f<T>(...), tensor.creata<T>(...)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `functio`, `tensor`, `typi-parametri`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/generic-call-type-args.html
- Source: examples/corpus/functio/generic-call-type-args.fab

#### `generics`

- Canonical: `generics`
- Kind: concept
- Category: type
- Summary: Angle-bracket generic parameters on functions and declarations.
- Syntax: `functio name<T>(...) | genus Name<T, magnitudo N>`
- Aliases: `type parameters`, `magnitudo`
- Related: `typus`, `functio`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/generics.html
- Source: examples/corpus/prae/prae.fab

#### `generis`

- Canonical: `generis`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Marks a class member as belonging to the type itself.
- Syntax: `generis <type> <name> [= <expression>]`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `genus`, `nexum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/generis.html
- Source: examples/corpus/generis/generis.fab

- Canonical: `genus`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Declares a concrete type with fields and methods.
- Syntax: `genus <name> [<type-params>] <block>`
- Aliases: `class`, `struct`
- Related: `implendum`, `abstractus`, `implet`, `sub`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/genus.html
- Source: examples/corpus/genus/genus.fab

- Canonical: `iace`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: errors
- Summary: Conditional throw with si guard.
- Syntax: `iace <expression> si <condition>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `cape`, `mori`, `si`, `‚á•`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/iace.html
- Source: examples/corpus/iace/iace-si-guard.fab

#### `iacit`

- Canonical: `iacit`
- Kind: modifier
- Category: function
- Summary: Marks a function as able to throw along a recoverable channel.
- Syntax: `functio <name>(...) iacit ‚Üí <type> [‚á• <error-type>]`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `iace`, `cape`, `‚á•`, `errata`, `immutata`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/iacit.html
- Source: examples/corpus/meta/iacit.fab

- Canonical: `immutata`

- Syntax: `functio <name>(...) immutata ‚Üí <type>`

- Related: `curata`, `iacit`

- Canonical: `implendum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Declares a behavioral contract with method signatures.
- Syntax: `implendum <name> [<type-params>] <block>`
- Aliases: `interface`
- Related: `genus`, `implet`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/implendum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/implendum/implendum.fab

#### `implet`

- Canonical: `implet`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: type
- Summary: Declares that a type implements one or more implendum contracts.
- Syntax: `genus <name> implet <interface-list> <block>`
- Aliases: `implements`
- Related: `genus`, `implendum`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/implet.html
- Source: examples/corpus/implet/implet.fab

#### `importa`

- Canonical: `importa`

- Category: package
- Summary: Canonical braced import record with private binding inferred from the path.
- Syntax: `importa { ex = "norma:chorda" }`
- Aliases: `import`
- Related: `ex`, `privata`, `annotation-sugar`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/importa.html
- Source: examples/corpus/importa/default-braced.fab

- Related: `de`, `ex`

- Category: cli

- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/optio.html

- Summary: Continues with the next loop iteration.

#### `postpara`

- Canonical: `postpara`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: testing
- Summary: Registers an after-each test hook.
- Syntax: `postpara <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `praepara`, `omnia`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/postpara.html
- Source: examples/corpus/postpara/postpara.fab

#### `postparabit`

- Canonical: `postparabit`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: testing
- Summary: Registers an async after-each test hook.
- Syntax: `postparabit <block>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `postpara`, `praeparabit`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/postparabit.html
- Source: examples/corpus/postparabit/postparabit.fab

#### `praefixum`

- Canonical: `praefixum`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: comptime
- Summary: Forces compile-time evaluation of an expression.
- Syntax: `praefixum(<expression>)`

- Related: none
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/praefixum.html
- Source: examples/corpus/praefixum/praefixum.fab

- Related: `publica`, `importa`

- Source: examples/corpus/privata/privata.fab

- Aliases: `protected`
- Related: `publica`, `privata`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/protecta.html
- Source: examples/corpus/protecta/protecta.fab

- Related: `privata`, `importa`

#### `secus`

- Canonical: `secus`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Runs the fallback branch when preceding conditional branches do not match.
- Syntax: `secus <block>`
- Aliases: `else`, `otherwise`
- Related: `si`, `sin`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/secus.html
- Source: examples/corpus/secus/secus.fab

#### `si`

- Canonical: `si`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts a conditional branch that runs when its condition is true.
- Syntax: `si <condition> <block>`
- Aliases: `if`
- Related: `sin`, `secus`, `ergo`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/si.html
- Source: examples/corpus/si/nidificatus.fab

#### `sic`

- Canonical: `sic`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Starts the true branch of a one-line conditional expression.
- Syntax: `si <condition> sic <expression> secus <expression>`
- Aliases: `then`
- Related: `si`, `secus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/sic.html
- Source: examples/corpus/sic/sic.fab

#### `sin`

- Canonical: `sin`
- Kind: keyword
- Category: control-flow
- Summary: Adds an else-if branch after a previous si branch.
- Syntax: `sin <condition> <block>`
- Aliases: `else if`
- Related: `si`, `secus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/sin.html
- Source: examples/corpus/si/sin.fab

#### `¬ß`

- Canonical: `¬ß`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: format
- Summary: String-template substitution holes inside quoted literals.
- Syntax: `"<template>"(<args>...)`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `textus`, `scribe`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%C2%A7.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/metadata.fab

#### `‚Ä•`

- Canonical: `‚Ä•`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: range
- Summary: Half-open and inclusive range endpoints in itera ab and intra.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚Ä• <expression> | <expression> ‚Ä¶ <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚Ä•`, `‚Ä¶`, `ante`, `usque`, `intra`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%80%A5.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/range-glyphs.fab

#### `‚Üê`

- Canonical: `‚Üê`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: assignment
- Summary: Assigns a value to a binding, field, or assignable expression.
- Syntax: `<place> ‚Üê <expression>`
- Aliases: `assignment`, `assign`
- Related: `=`, `fixum`, `varia`, `‚äï`, `‚äñ`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%86%90.html
- Source: examples/corpus/assignatio/assignatio.fab

#### `‚Üí`

- Canonical: `‚Üí`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: function
- Summary: Success return type and recoverable alternate-exit type in function signatures.
- Syntax: `functio <name>(<params>) ‚Üí <type> | functio <name>(<params>) ‚Üí <success> ‚á• <error>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚á•`, `functio`, `redde`, `iace`, `cape`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%86%92.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/function-types.fab

#### `‚Ü¶`

- Canonical: `‚Ü¶`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: conversion
- Summary: Converts a value with explicit runtime parsing or coercion semantics.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚Ü¶ <type> [‚á• <recovery>]`
- Aliases: `convert`, `conversio`
- Related: `‚à∑`, `‚á•`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%86%A6.html
- Source: examples/corpus/conversio/conversio.fab

#### `‚àß`

- Canonical: `‚àß`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: bitwise
- Summary: Bitwise and, or, xor, not, and shifts on numerus operands.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚àß <expression> | <expression> ‚äª <expression> | ¬¨ <expression> | <expression> ‚áê <expression> | <expression> ‚áí <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚à®`, `‚äª`, `¬¨`, `‚áê`, `‚áí`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%88%A7.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/bitwise.fab

#### `‚à®`

- Canonical: `‚à®`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: logic
- Summary: Bitwise or and est-negation operators.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚à® <expression> | <expression> non est <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚àß`, `‚äª`, `¬¨`, `et`, `aut`, `vel`, `non est`, `est`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%88%A8.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/logica.fab

#### `‚à™`

- Canonical: `‚à™`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: type
- Summary: Inline value unions and discerne on discretio variants.
- Syntax: `typus <name> = <type> ‚à™ <type>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `typus`, `discerne`, `discretio`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%88%AA.html
- Source: examples/corpus/unio/unio.fab

#### `‚âà`

- Canonical: `‚âà`
- Kind: operator
- Category: comparison
- Summary: Numeric value equality after promotion join ‚Äî not fuzzy float.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚âà <expression> | <expression> ‚ââ <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚â°`, `‚âÝ`, `‚Ü¶`, `adfirma`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%89%88.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/numeric-value-eq.fab

#### `‚â°`

- Canonical: `‚â°`
- Kind: operator-group
- Category: comparison
- Summary: Equality and ordering comparisons returning bivalens.
- Syntax: `<expression> ‚â° <expression> | <expression> ‚âÝ <expression> | <expression> ‚â§ <expression> | <expression> ‚â• <expression>`
- Aliases: none
- Related: `‚âÝ`, `‚â§`, `‚â•`, `est`, `adfirma`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%89%A1.html
- Source: examples/corpus/operatores/comparatio.fab

#### `‚äï`

- Canonical: `‚äï`
- Kind: operator
- Category: mutation
- Summary: Postfix increment statement for a mutable numerus place.
- Syntax: `<place> ‚äï`
- Aliases: `postfix increment`, `increment statement`
- Related: `‚äñ`, `varia`, `‚Üê`, `numerus`
- Page: https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/%E2%8A%95.html
- Source: examples/corpus/incrementa/incrementa.fab

### Alias map

- `!` ‚Üí `non`
- `"..."` ‚Üí `string`
- `'...'` ‚Üí `ascii`
- `...` ‚Üí `sparge`
- `and` ‚Üí `et`
- `annotation` ‚Üí `@`
- `array` ‚Üí `lista`
- `as` ‚Üí `ut`
- `assert` ‚Üí `adfirma`
- `assign` ‚Üí `‚Üê`
- `assignment` ‚Üí `‚Üê`
- `await` ‚Üí `cede`
- `backends` ‚Üí `targets`
- `break` ‚Üí `rumpe`
- `bytes` ‚Üí `octeti`
- `case` ‚Üí `casu`
- `catch` ‚Üí `cape`
- `choose` ‚Üí `elige`
- `class` ‚Üí `genus`
- `closure` ‚Üí `clausa`
- `const` ‚Üí `fixum`
- `continue` ‚Üí `perge`
- `conversio` ‚Üí `‚Ü¶`
- `convert` ‚Üí `‚Ü¶`

## Documentation map

- https://faberlang.dev/ ‚Äî language portal (pick a site locale)
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/ ‚Äî English overview + download (canonical full tree)
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/start/ ‚Äî quick tour
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/features/ ‚Äî locales, lanes, glyphs, principles
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/syntax/ ‚Äî language reference
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/tooling/ ‚Äî compiler, CLI, targets
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/ecosystem/ ‚Äî Norma, Cista, Triga, workbench
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/corpus/ ‚Äî generated keyword / construct pages
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/references/ ‚Äî EBNF, design docs, repos
- https://faberlang.dev/en-US/history/ ‚Äî timeline
- Prefer /en-US/‚Ä¶ over bare /start/‚Ä¶ or /syntax/‚Ä¶ (those are redirect stubs).

## Repositories

- https://github.com/faberlang/faber ‚Äî public user CLI
- https://github.com/faberlang/releases ‚Äî tagged CLI release assets
- https://github.com/faberlang/faber-runtime ‚Äî runtime types for generated Rust
- https://github.com/faberlang/norma ‚Äî standard library
- https://github.com/faberlang/cista ‚Äî package store
- https://github.com/faberlang/triga ‚Äî graphics / geometry
- https://github.com/faberlang/examples ‚Äî corpus + application packages
- https://github.com/faberlang/faberlang.dev ‚Äî this site
